title: First skill instance — substrate-before-write (org scope, working-model)
description: First of three foundational skill instances landing the skills meta-layer (PR #113) into operational use. substrate-before-write captures the meta-pattern proven across session 2026-06-03 via three negative-case proofs handled by REFUSE-AND-SURFACE: chat-side authoring must read canonical substrate before composing artifacts that touch existing state. Org scope (cross-cutting holdings-level) because the failure class applies to all agents, not just dev-pipeline. Lands at lifecycleStatus=working-model per memory rule 20 (substrate supports loaded posture). Lands with paired SKILL.md generated by tools/skill_generate.py for CI drift-check workflow.

outputs.description: Land skills/_instances/org/substrate-before-write/skill-instance.json — first skill instance authored under the skills meta-layer landed in PR #113. Schema-validated chat-side against skill.schema.json v1.0.0. Captures the substrate-before-write meta-pattern with 3 triggerContext blocks (12 example cues), 5 directives, 5 antiPatterns, 3 boundaryConditions, 5 cross-references. lifecycleStatus=working-model with 2 transitions documenting authoring + initial loaded posture (per memory rule 20 substrate-supports).
acceptanceCriteria: ajv validates skill-instance.json against schemas/skill.schema.json v1.0.0 with exit 0
skill-instance-validation.yml CI workflow PASS on PR

outputs.description: Generate paired SKILL.md via tools/skill_generate.py at skills/_instances/org/substrate-before-write/SKILL.md. Per memory rule 19 (no-md-terminus), SKILL.md is generated artifact with generationMetadata block written by the generator including sourceJsonSha. Per PR #113 substrate, skill-md-generation-check.yml CI verifies SKILL.md generation roundtrip is SHA-stable.
acceptanceCriteria: generationMetadata block populated with sourceJsonSha matching SHA-256 of skill-instance.json
skill-md-generation-check.yml CI workflow PASS on PR (regenerate-in-place + diff returns no drift)

outputs.description: Deliverable instance lands at schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-04-sr-skill-substrate-before-write.json. Captures the closure work itself per memory #20 substrate-cleanup-as-you-go.
acceptanceCriteria: Deliverable instance lands at canonical path
ajv validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0 with -r forbidden-audit-paint-names schema, exit 0

preMerge: Chat-side sandbox: skill-instance.json validates against skill.schema.json v1.0.0 — exit 0
tools/skill_generate.py produces SKILL.md without error; generationMetadata.sourceJsonSha matches SHA-256 of skill-instance.json
ajv-cli@5.0.0 validates this deliverable instance against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0 with -r forbidden-audit-paint-names schema — exit 0
scope-overlap-check + validate-instances + check-canonical-meta-schema + check-mergeability + Validate Roadmap Files + refs-check + broadcast + validate all PASS
git diff --stat scoped to exactly 3 files
postMerge: skill-instance.json + SKILL.md both present on main at canonical paths
Total skill instances on main: 0 -> 1 (first non-fixture instance)
Unblocks PR 2 (canonical-schema-authoring) and PR 3 (cross-repo-execution-shape) as remaining 2 skills in foundational 3-skill arc

transitions.trigger: Spec authored after substrate-read of skill.schema.json v1.0.0 (uploaded 2026-06-04) and 5 in-band failure-case proofs accumulated across 2026-06-03 and 2026-06-04 cross-repo arcs (PRs #106, #119, #121, #122, #124). First of three foundational skills authorized by Erik 2026-06-04 'these are the approved skills to start with. three pr is fine as this will match later patterns. lets proceed and ensure we have a clear path to the validated deployment of these rules' AND continuation 'lets finish the skills arc and ship it with all three PR. we can address the FU to start or post based on seq. all work to be completed'. Sequenced first as meta-pattern: substrate-before-write is the predicate to both canonical-schema-authoring (skill 2) and cross-repo-execution-shape (skill 3).

notes: First of 3 PRs in foundational skill arc per Erik direction 2026-06-04 'finish the skills arc and ship it with all three PR'. PR 1 ships substrate-before-write (org) first because it is the meta-predicate to the other two. PR 2 ships canonical-schema-authoring (dev-pipeline) capturing F0B85LNSTC4 doctrine — sandbox-validate against canonical schemas before handoff. PR 3 ships cross-repo-execution-shape (dev-pipeline) capturing the 5-stage flow proven 7x across the session arc. After PR 3 lands, the composite path opens: FU-SR-RULE-CANONICAL-SCHEMA-AUTHORING-DOCTRINE-1 (filed PR #115) becomes promotable to working-model rule instance paired with skill 2 via pairedRule field — first rule+skill composite under the meta-layer. Out of scope this arc per memory #18 scope-lock, in clear path. Each skill ships in its own PR mirroring later patterns.
